MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Balawant Thakor is present.
Plaintiff is in pro per.
Defendants, Hilde Christine Wilson and Thomas Cronin, are present.
Attorney, Matthew Berde, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Bob Kane, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 304B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was NOT filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-10-2010 is vacated.
